'''Hav''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] hunter who traveled to [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] with [[Jivis]] in order to hunt for [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]].

==Biography==
Hav, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], was a wealthy businessbeing. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] to partake in a [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]-hunting safari alongside a fellow Duros, [[Jivis]]. The hunt was led by a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]], [[Falmal]], and four other hunters rounded out the party; a [[Thennqora]] named [[Tamish]], the [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]] [[Cob-caree]], and two [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quelev Tapper|Seoul]] of [[Sif-Uwana]].<ref name="FC" />

==Personality and traits==
Hav was a wealthy Duros who was bored and looking for excitement, leading to him signing up for a hunting expedition. Despite his wealth, Hav complained that he had to work for his excitement.<ref name="FC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hav first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[First Contact]]'', which was published in [[1994]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] by [[West End Games]]. ''First Contact'' was subsequently reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].
